title: onMount
description: Runs a function once when the component initializes, without tracking dependencies.
param_fn_desc: Function to run once on mount. Runs untracked; signal reads don't create dependencies.
usage_sweep: The uptime monitor's <0>HttpCheck</0> uses <1>onMount</1> to fire the first probe and start the sweep interval exactly once. The paired <2>onCleanup</2> clears that interval when the check unmounts.
in_the_wild: See this sweep loop start up per target in the <0>uptime-monitor walkthrough</0>.
